name: AWS Activate Founders
public_description: Up to $100K in AWS credits for pre-Series B startups. World's leading cloud platform.
locked_instructions:
1. Go to aws.amazon.com/startups/credits
2. Apply for the Portfolio tier (requires VC/accelerator backing).
3. Founders tier ($1K) is open to all.
4. Have your AWS account on Paid Tier before applying.

name: GCP for Startups
public_description: Up to $350K for AI-first startups. Includes Firebase, Maps, and Workspace credits.
locked_instructions:
1. Visit cloud.google.com/startup
2. Apply for the Scale Tier (Series A or earlier).
3. Upload your term sheet or accelerator acceptance letter.
4. Standard tier gives $200K, AI-first startups get $350K.

name: Azure Founders Hub
public_description: Up to $150K in Azure credits for investor-affiliated startups. Bootstrapped founders start with up to $5K and can level up based on traction. Also includes GitHub Enterprise and Microsoft 365.
locked_instructions:
1. Go to microsoft.com/en-us/startups
2. Create a Founders Hub account, no investor backing needed to start.
3. Bootstrapped founders get $1K-$5K free, investor-backed startups can unlock up to $150K.
4. Includes GitHub Enterprise seats and Microsoft 365 licenses.

name: Cloudflare for Startups
public_description: Up to $250K in credits for security, performance, and reliability services for one year.
locked_instructions:
1. Go to cloudflare.com/forstartups
2. Sign up for a free Cloudflare account and add a valid credit card.
3. Fill out the startup application form.
4. Credits expire within 1 year, plan your usage accordingly.

name: Notion for Startups
public_description: Up to 6 months free Notion Business Plan including Notion AI, worth up to $6,000.
locked_instructions:
1. Go to notion.com/startups
2. Non-partner startups get 3 months free, apply directly.
3. Partner-affiliated startups get 6 months free.
4. Must be a new non-paying Notion customer with under 100 employees.

4. Also consider Stripe Atlas which includes $2,500 in Stripe credits plus $50K in partner perks.
